data.title: DJT Stock In Focus As Trump Set To Ring NYSE Bell Today: Here's Why President-Elect Once Threatened To Shift Trump Media From Nasdaq
data.description: President-elect Donald Trump is set to ring the New York Stock Exchange opening bell Thursday, just months after threatening to move his company Trump Media & Technology Group Corp. from Nasdaq to NYSE over trading halts.

data.title: Microsoft Expects $800 Million Impairment Charge Due To GM's Cruise Exit, Analyst Says It's A 'Step In The Right Direction' For Automaker
data.description: Microsoft Corp (NASDAQ: MSFT) has said that it will be recording an impairment charge of approximately $800 million in the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, according to an SEC filing. This follows General Motors Co (NYSE: GM) exit from funding Cruise‘s robotaxi development.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Trims Tesla Exposure Amid Searing Rally, Sells $21.8M Worth Of Stock — Bets On This AI Medical Company
data.description: On Wednesday Dec. 11, 2024, Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest sold $21.8 million worth of Tesla shares.

data.title: Jim Cramer Bullish On Netflix Nearing $1,000 And AMD's 'Cheap' Valuation Despite Nvidia Dominance
data.description: Jim Cramer expressed strong buying conviction for Netflix Inc. during Wednesday's Lightning Round on "Mad Money," as the streaming giant's shares traded near $934 amid broader tech market strength.

data.title: Tom Lee Reiterates Bitcoin's $250,000 Target For 2025, Says New White House Is 'Embracing' Digital Assets: 'We Have A Trump Put'
data.description: Prominent financial market commentator Tom Lee doubled down on his $250,000 price target for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in 2025 on Wednesday, thanks to a friendlier White House.
